ui.optLongForm: Include all commits in the changelog
ui.optShortForm: Include only the most recent commits in the changelog
ui.optShortLength: Set the count of commits to include in the short form
ui.optBothForms: Write both forms.  Optionally, include the long form filename as an argument
ui.optUiLang: Language for help text and console output
ui.optTranslator: Translator for changelog content ('claude' or an executable name)
ui.errUnknownLocale: Unknown language '{code}'; falling back to English.

changelog.prefaceSentence: All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.
changelog.author: Author:
